interpretation.why_not_complete: This probe only diagnoses USD layer save policy. It does not generate a valid G1 USD, motion.npz, official replay, tracking metric, PPO checkpoint, teacher rollout, or paper-level closed-loop result.

scope: Minimal USD save-policy diagnostic for the official replay blocker. It tests plain Python pxr import and AppLauncher USD layer saving across tmp/cache/res paths, .usd/.usda, Save, Export, and SetPermissionToSave(True). No replay, training, task smoke, video, or robot execution is performed.
